recipes.name: Advanced Rate Limiting (Upstash)
recipes.description: Implement distributed rate limiting using Upstash Redis and the @upstash/ratelimit library. Supports sliding window, fixed window, and token bucket algorithms. Works in Edge Runtime, Vercel Functions, and traditional servers.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: AI Image Generation
recipes.description: Add AI image generation to any app. Covers DALL-E 3 for quality, Replicate Flux for speed, prompt engineering patterns, generated image storage in S3/Cloudflare R2, and a React gallery component.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: AI Streaming Chat (Vercel AI SDK)
recipes.description: Integrate the Vercel AI SDK to stream AI responses in real time. Includes useChat hook, streaming API route, message history, and abort handling. Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and Groq.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: AI Structured Output (Tool Calls)
recipes.description: Use OpenAI function calling / structured outputs with Zod schemas to guarantee typed JSON responses from any model. Includes schema definition, validation, error retry, and streaming with partial object support.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: API Key Authentication
recipes.description: Implement API key authentication for developer-facing APIs. Keys are SHA-256 hashed before storage (never store raw keys), support scopes (read/write/admin), have per-key rate limits, and log every request for billing.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Auth.js v5 (Next-Auth)
recipes.description: Configure Auth.js v5 with multiple OAuth providers (GitHub, Google, Discord), database sessions via Drizzle adapter, and RBAC. Includes protected API routes, server actions auth, and JWT customization.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Background Jobs with Inngest
recipes.description: Implement reliable background job processing with Inngest. Create durable functions that run after HTTP responses, retry automatically on failure, support fan-out workflows, and can be scheduled as crons.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Clerk Auth for Next.js
recipes.description: Add Clerk authentication to a Next.js App Router project. Includes middleware for protected routes, useUser hook, UserButton component, webhooks for user events, and organization support for multi-tenant SaaS.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Cloudflare Workers + D1
recipes.description: Build and deploy a Cloudflare Workers API with D1 (SQLite at the edge), KV storage, and R2 for files. Sub-millisecond cold starts, 0ms latency from your users' location, and a generous free tier.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: CodeQL Security Scanning + Dependabot
recipes.description: Set up GitHub CodeQL for static security analysis and Dependabot for dependency vulnerability scanning. CodeQL finds XSS, SQL injection, and path traversal in your code. Dependabot auto-PRs vulnerable dependency updates.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL
recipes.description: Set up Drizzle ORM with PostgreSQL. Define schemas in TypeScript, run type-safe queries, generate and apply migrations. Includes relations, prepared statements, and Drizzle Studio for visual data exploration.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: File Uploads with UploadThing
recipes.description: Add file uploads to a Next.js app using UploadThing. Includes file type validation, size limits, upload progress UI, server-side processing callback, and CDN-delivered URLs. No S3 configuration needed.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Full-Text Search with Meilisearch
recipes.description: Add Meilisearch for lightning-fast, typo-tolerant full-text search. Index your database records, configure searchable/filterable attributes, and build a search UI with InstantSearch React components.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: GitHub Actions CI/CD
recipes.description: Production GitHub Actions workflow for Node.js. Includes npm caching (cuts install from 60s to 5s), parallel test and lint jobs, type checking, and deploy-to-Vercel/Railway on merge to main.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Job Queues with BullMQ + Redis
recipes.description: Set up BullMQ for reliable job queue processing. Covers producer/consumer pattern, job concurrency limits, exponential backoff retry, scheduled jobs, job events, and Bull Board UI for monitoring.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Kubernetes Deployment with Helm
recipes.description: Create a Helm chart for deploying a Node.js app to Kubernetes. Includes Deployment with resource limits, HorizontalPodAutoscaler, ConfigMap, ExternalSecret (for secrets manager), and Ingress with cert-manager TLS.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: LangChain Agent with Tools
recipes.description: Create a LangChain agent with custom tools (web search, database queries, API calls). Uses ReAct reasoning loop, conversation memory, and streaming output. Includes LangSmith tracing for debugging.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Lemon Squeezy (Digital Products)
recipes.description: Integrate Lemon Squeezy for selling digital products, SaaS subscriptions, and licenses. They are the Merchant of Record — they handle VAT, sales tax, and EU compliance. Includes webhook handler and license key activation.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Local AI with Ollama
recipes.description: Set up Ollama for local AI development. Run open-source models (Llama 3.1, Mistral, CodeLlama) with no API keys, no cost per token, and data never leaving your machine. Integrates with the same Vercel AI SDK interface.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: MCP Server (Model Context Protocol)
recipes.description: Build a Model Context Protocol server that exposes your app's data and actions as tools for AI agents. Includes tool definitions, resource handlers, and connection to Claude Desktop and cursor.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: n8n Workflow Automation
recipes.description: Deploy and integrate n8n for workflow automation. Create automations that trigger on webhooks, schedule with cron, and connect your app to Slack, email, databases, and 400+ other services. Self-hosted for data privacy.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: OpenTelemetry Full Observability
recipes.description: Instrument a Node.js app with OpenTelemetry SDK. Exports traces to Jaeger, metrics to Prometheus, and logs to Grafana Loki. Includes auto-instrumentation for HTTP, database, and custom business spans.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: OWASP API Security Top 10
recipes.description: Implement defenses for the OWASP API Security Top 10 (2023). Covers broken object authorization, authentication flaws, unrestricted resource consumption, injection, and security misconfiguration — with code examples for each.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: PostHog Analytics + Feature Flags
recipes.description: Integrate PostHog for product analytics and feature flags. Track custom events, define funnels, enable session replay, and use feature flags to roll out features to specific user segments. Self-hostable.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Production Docker Setup
recipes.description: Create a production-grade Dockerfile and Docker Compose setup. Multi-stage build (deps → builder → runner), non-root user, health checks, .dockerignore, and docker-compose with Postgres and Redis.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Progressive Web App with Next.js
recipes.description: Convert a Next.js app into a PWA with offline support, push notifications, home screen installation, and app-like navigation. Uses next-pwa with Workbox service worker strategies.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: RAG Pipeline with pgvector
recipes.description: Build a Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline using pgvector in PostgreSQL. Embed documents with OpenAI text-embedding-3-small, store vectors in Postgres, and use cosine similarity search to inject context into prompts.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: React Native with Expo EAS
recipes.description: Set up a React Native app with Expo and EAS (Expo Application Services). Get OTA updates (ship without App Store review), cloud builds (no Mac needed for iOS), and preview builds for testing.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Real-Time with Supabase
recipes.description: Add real-time features using Supabase Realtime: database change subscriptions (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE events), presence (who's online), and broadcast (send arbitrary messages to all connected clients). Zero WebSocket server setup.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Secrets Management (Doppler)
recipes.description: Eliminate .env files from production using Doppler. Secrets are stored encrypted, access is audited, and they sync automatically to Vercel/AWS/GitHub Actions. Includes secret rotation and the developer local workflow.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4
recipes.description: Set up shadcn/ui with Tailwind CSS v4 in a Next.js project. Includes dark mode, custom theme tokens, 10 most-used components (Button, Dialog, Sheet, Form, Table, etc.), and Storybook for component development.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Stripe Checkout
recipes.description: Implement Stripe Checkout for one-time payments. Includes a checkout session API route, success/cancel redirect pages, webhook handler for payment_intent.succeeded, and order fulfillment trigger.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Stripe Subscriptions (SaaS Billing)
recipes.description: Full SaaS billing with Stripe Subscriptions. Covers plan tiers, trial periods, subscription webhooks (created/updated/cancelled), usage-based billing, and the Stripe Customer Portal for self-serve plan management.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Supabase Auth with Social Login
recipes.description: Set up Supabase Auth with email/password, Google OAuth, and magic links. Includes server-side session handling with SSR helpers, Row Level Security policies, and a user profile table linked to auth.users.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Terraform AWS Infrastructure
recipes.description: Define AWS production infrastructure with Terraform. Creates VPC with public/private subnets, ECS Fargate cluster, RDS PostgreSQL (Multi-AZ), Application Load Balancer, ACM certificate, and ECR registry.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Transactional Email with Resend
recipes.description: Set up Resend for transactional email with React Email templates. Includes welcome email, password reset, invoice, and notification templates. Custom domain setup for near-100% inbox delivery.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: tRPC v11 Type-Safe API
recipes.description: Set up tRPC v11 with Next.js App Router. Define procedures on the server, call them from the client with full autocomplete and type safety. Includes auth middleware, input validation with Zod, React Query integration.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Turborepo Monorepo
recipes.description: Set up a Turborepo monorepo with pnpm workspaces. Apps: web (Next.js), api (Hono/Express), mobile (Expo). Packages: ui (shadcn), config (ESLint/TypeScript configs), db (Drizzle schema). Remote caching with Vercel.
recipes.author: agentgram-team

recipes.name: Web to iOS/Android with Capacitor
recipes.description: Wrap any existing web app (React, Next.js, Vue) in a native iOS and Android app using Capacitor. Access camera, GPS, biometrics, and native APIs. Submit to App Store and Google Play from your web codebase.
recipes.author: agentgram-team
